Ruddy Shelduck
More info
eBird
(Tadorna ferruginea)

  • 27/06/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Sasha Bertasius) "Continuing bird, seen from dirt track at the Eastern side of the quarry with hundreds of Greylag geese, female bird. Very orange goose-like waterfowl with pale face and dark bill and legs."

Surf Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta perspicillata)

  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Andy Jarrett) "Asleep most of the time with other scoter flock but showing white nape clearly. Both woke up once each and showed bills off nicely."
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Owen Chiang) "two individuals with a group of velvet scoter"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Vicky Yeung) "two individuals with a group of velvet scoter"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Tom Gale) "known birds on sea with velvet scoter"
  • 29/06/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (David Kelly) "2 males, known birds off eastern end of the scrapes."
  • 29/06/26 Sea wall at Musselburgh 2 (Mark O'Brien) "Patchwork white heads stood out, even from a distance"
  • 29/06/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 2 (Stuart Housden) "2 Drakes on sea"
  • 28/06/26 Musselburgh--Shore 2 (Vicky C.) "2 surf scoters mixed with a group of velvet scoters"
  • 28/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Pasi Hyvönen) "Off sea wall"

Velvet Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta fusca) 100+

  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 24 (Owen Chiang) "a group of velvet scoter with 2 surf scoter on sea"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Vicky Yeung) "mixef with a group of common scoter"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 25 (Tom Gale) "not rare"
  • 29/06/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 6 (David Kelly) "Not rare here."
  • 29/06/26 Sea wall at Musselburgh 20 (Mark O'Brien) "Regular sightings, most birds just sitting on sea, makes showing white teardrop, females all dark, including cheeks. In 2 or 3 separate clocks, one of which included the surf scoters."
  • 29/06/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 6 (Stuart Housden) "Small group offshore. The 2 Surf Scoters were with them."
  • 28/06/26 Musselburgh--Shore 7 (Vicky C.) "have pics"
  • 27/06/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 7 (Timothy Akin) "All Black Sea duck with white wing patch. Yellow tip to bill with less pronounced knob than other similar scoters. White eye spot. Photos attached."
  • 26/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Evan Garner) "Tricky ID. Seen distantly with a scope. Prominent white wing patch. White mark under eye. Yellowish-orange bill. First impression was wing patch too broad and large for velvet scoter. Thought it was a Whit[...]"

eBird
(Bucephala clangula)

  • 26/06/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Sasha Bertasius) "Male bird at the eastern side of the quarry with Pochard and Tufted duck, viewed from dirt track."
